headline: FY2026 10-K clean: Deloitte unqualified on financials & ICFR, no material weakness, no restatement; 25 risk factors unchanged YoY (new tariff/IEEPA disclosure sits in MD&A); debt-free except ~$1.23B operating leases; founder family/insiders ~32% with notable Hayne-family employment; Q1 FY2027 10-Q not yet filed.
